svg.title: A199 public ChaCha20 formula-operator atlas
svg.desc: Adjacent column-diagonal commutators dominate same-phase lag-two controls, the chronological product contracts while its order gap persists, and the third-cumulant statistic remains below its frozen marginal-preserving null threshold.
svg.text: Deterministic public states · 20 rounds · no hidden assignment · no solver · no key-recovery claim
Relative Frobenius commutator by starting round
Log-scale diagnostic by cumulative round depth
L2 statistic normalized by the exact 32-null mean
H2 not retained · empirical upper p = 0.272727 · same marginals exact
All five masks are nested thresholds of mode 1; this is a partition baseline, not a demonstrated multimode mixture. T05 signed channel = 0.244046475056, rank = 20.
